titles.title: FARM Home Loans Act of 2025
FARM Home Loans Act of 2025
Fostering the Availability in Rural Markets of Home Loans Act of 2025
To amend the Farm Credit Act of 1971 to modify rural housing financing under that Act.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Agriculture.
Referred to the Subcommittee on Commodity Markets, Digital Assets, and Rural Development.
Referred to the Subcommittee on General Farm Commodities, Risk Management, and Credit.

committee.name: House Agriculture
committee.subcommittee: Commodity Markets, Digital Assets, and Rural Development

committee.name: House Agriculture
committee.subcommittee: General Farm Commodities, Risk Management, and Credit
